Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Enhance student profile view with comprehensive 127-field display

**Updated profile-sections.blade.php:**
- Added all 127 fields organized into 10 sections matching create/edit forms
- Added FontAwesome icons to section headers for better visual hierarchy
- New sections: Transfer Information, Special Needs & Intervention
- Enhanced Personal Preferences section with all device/internet fields
- Added death certificate fields to parent information
- Added registrant nationality and email fields
- Conditional rendering for Transfer and Special Needs sections (only show if data exists)

**Updated print.blade.php:**
- Added FontAwesome library for section icons
- Enhanced CSS with gradient backgrounds and better typography
- Added left border accent (4px indigo) to section cards
- Improved passport photo border (3px indigo with shadow)
- Better color scheme with professional indigo accents
- Enhanced label styling with uppercase, letter-spacing, and gray color
- Removed auto-print onload - user can now view before printing
- Better print styles with optimized borders and shadows

**Visual Improvements:**
- Professional gradient backgrounds on section cards
- Consistent indigo color scheme (#4f46e5)
- Better hierarchy with section icons and styled headers
- Improved readability with optimized font sizes and weights
- Box shadows for depth (removed in print mode)
